seo.title: SEO & Metadata
seo.description: Configure your site's SEO settings for each language.
seo.metaDescriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of your website

general.title: General Settings
general.description: Configure language, timezone, and date/time formats.
general.siteLanguageDescription: Select the default language for your website.
general.timezoneDescription: Choose either a city in the same timezone as you or a UTC offset.
general.dateFormatDescription: Choose how dates are displayed on your site.

appearance.title: Appearance Settings
appearance.description: Customize the visual appearance of your dashboard.
appearance.colorSchemeDescription: Choose the primary color for your interface.
appearance.borderRadiusDescription: Adjust the roundness of UI elements.

loading.description: Show a smooth overlay while internal links and page transitions are loading.
loading.spinnerDescription: Choose an animated spinner from the svg-spinners collection.
loading.spinnerModalDescription: Select the option used for route loading.
loading.colorModeDescription: Use your active color scheme or pick a custom loading color.

features.title: Feature Management
features.description: Enable the modules and plugins this project can use across core and frontend surfaces.
features.empty: No active features are available for this project.
features.emptyFilter: No features match the current filters.
features.disableConfirmDescription: Disabling {feature} stops the capability for this project. Existing feature data is kept so it can be re-enabled later.

system.title: System features
system.description: Built-in capabilities can be enabled or disabled per project.

modules.title: Modules
modules.description: Deployable modules can be activated per project.
modules.empty: No modules are available for this project.
modules.reinstallTooltip: Reinstall this module and refresh its files
modules.uninstallTooltip: Deactivate this module for the project
modules.deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently removes the module from disk and clears its data from installed projects. This action cannot be undone.
modules.uninstalled: Module deactivated; its data was preserved
modules.uninstallConfirmDescription: Deactivating this module will disable it for this project. Its data will be preserved and can be restored if you reactivate it later.
modules.importConflictDescription: The module {name} already exists (current version: {existingVersion}). Would you like to overwrite it with version {newVersion}?

importErrors.invalidZip: The uploaded file is not a valid module ZIP.
importErrors.tooManyFiles: The module archive contains too many files.
importErrors.invalidPath: The module archive contains an invalid file path.
importErrors.tooLarge: The module archive is too large.
importErrors.missingManifest: The module archive is missing module.json.
importErrors.moduleServerConfigUnavailable: Module source is available, but its server configuration is not ready yet. Please try again in a moment.

modules.emptyFilter: No modules match the current filters.
modules.updateTooltip: Install the latest version of this module
modules.cascadeWarning: The following active modules also depend on this and may stop working:

mediaManagement.title: Media management
mediaManagement.description: Adds the project media capability for storing, organizing, and reusing uploaded assets.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.description: Enables visitor tracking and analytics for your project's public site.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.description: Configures assistant models, providers, and prompt workflows for the project.

pageBuilder.title: Page Builder
pageBuilder.description: Visual page builder for creating and editing content layouts without code.

maxFileSizeMB.label: Max file size
maxFileSizeMB.description: Largest file size accepted for each media upload.

maxHourlyUploadMB.label: Max hourly upload
maxHourlyUploadMB.description: Maximum media upload volume allowed per user each hour.

maxTotalStorageGB.label: Max total storage
maxTotalStorageGB.description: Maximum total storage capacity for this project's media library.

maxStoragePerUserMB.label: Max storage per user
maxStoragePerUserMB.description: Maximum media storage capacity assigned to each user.

sessionTimeoutSeconds.label: Session timeout
sessionTimeoutSeconds.description: Time after which an inactive visitor session is considered expired.

liveThresholdSeconds.label: Live threshold
liveThresholdSeconds.description: Time interval to consider a visitor session as currently active.
